title: Slightly Vanilla
description: A Vanilla+ Optimization Modpack, adding nearly every available performance mod, better atmosphere, QoL improvements and better graphics.
body:
# Slightly Vanilla

**A Vanilla+ Optimization Modpack.**

This modpack allows you to play on Multiplayer servers just as you would with a Vanilla Client. 
But with way more FPS, better graphics/atmosphere and Quality of Life improvements offering you a more enjoyable experience.

![Slightly Vanilla Icon, resembling a vanilla fruit in vanilla-ish yellow with a thin white border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fd64e8a4a2100e5c657e5d66f07d3657f0a0b8e.png)

## Slightly Vanilla is adding

- nearly every available Performance Mod from Modrinth
- better Atmosphere
- better Graphics
- QoL improvements
- Privacy Enhancements

## Included Shaders

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT
- [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by EminGT
- [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) by javiergcim
- [Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) by sixthsurge
- [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader) by Septonious

## Included Resource Packs

- [Emissive TXF](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-txf) by jahirtrap
- [Fresh Animations - All Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) by FreshLX
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) by TrasTick, IthanMendoza (Slightly Vanilla 1.21.1 only)
- [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) by Motschen
- [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium) by robotkoer, FlashyReese

## Included Mods:
This Modlist is always referring to the latest Slightly Vanilla Version.
